column2: A Tide Pod for a Tied Pod
column36: 1st game had an unfortunate escape, due to Molat Boga being the first tactic and chaining into a twist. 2nd game I had much better decks on both sides but no Elite Assassins came up after I shuffled the first 2 back in.

column32: I did not make a second attempt.
column33: I did not make a second attempt.
column36: Setup bit too random for final fight, you could make infinite combo on turn 3, and still need to wait for elite assasins, and with extra villain group random factor gets bigger.

Twist and Mastermind Combo created a difficult, but fun scenario. I decided to forget strategy and just choose two of my favorite heroes instead, probably a bad idea as I wasn't able to beat it without escapes, but I still had a good time! Big thanks to Kylah The Bear for organizing and running this tournament!
